notifications.title: Welcome to J.U.L.I.U.S
notifications.message: Project J.U.L.I.U.S v2.0 is now operational. Your secure web surfing environment is ready. Explore all features from the navigation panel.

notifications.title: Security: IP Exposure Detected
notifications.message: Your real IP address has been detected. For your safety, we strongly recommend enabling VPN protection before conducting any security research. Visit the Security Center to review your exposure status.

notifications.title: New Resources Indexed
notifications.message: 47 new security research resources have been indexed across all 5 operational levels. Check the Level Explorer for the latest additions.

notifications.title: Ad Blocker Active
notifications.message: The integrated ad and tracker blocker is now active. Known tracking domains and ad networks are being filtered from your browsing sessions.

notifications.title: OPSEC Level Upgrade Available
notifications.message: Based on your recent activity, we recommend upgrading your OPSEC configuration to Level 2 (Enhanced). This includes VM isolation and VPN kill-switch enforcement.

notifications.title: Community Update: Zero One Charter v2.1
notifications.message: The Zero One community charter has been updated to include new guidelines for AI-assisted security research. Please review the updated community section.

notifications.title: Threat Intelligence Feed Updated
notifications.message: Latest IoC feeds from AlienVault OTX and Abuse.ch have been synchronized. 1,247 new indicators of compromise added to the threat database.

notifications.title: Privacy Alert: DNS Leak Possible
notifications.message: A potential DNS leak has been detected in your current session. Enable DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) in your security settings to prevent DNS query exposure.
